title: 11 Managing Outgoing Wire Fees
body_text:
11	Managing Outgoing Wire Fees
11.1	Overview of Managing Outgoing Wire Fees
Authorized Wires Users can view, add, modify, or delete outgoing wires fees in the Wires application. Outgoing wire fees are fees that you charge your customer for a wire. Wires Users must have the MTS 芒聙聹Spreads and Fees芒聙聺 permission assigned to access the Fees function. See Section 8.6, Creating a Wires User in MTS.
You can specify how outgoing wire fees apply in the Wires application. The following options are available:
Manual entry
芒聙聯 Users enter a fee when creating a wire. No fees are configured in the Wires application.
Pre-populated
芒聙聯Wires automatically populates the outgoing wire fee in the Fee field based on criteria that you define. Wires Users can manually overwrite a pre-populated fee.
You can configure the following fee types in Wires:
Outgoing wire fee
芒聙聯 The fee you charge your customers for regular outgoing wires.
Add-on fee
芒聙聯 An additional fee for a future-dated or priority wire (if applicable). The add-on fee is combined with the regular outgoing wire fee in the Fee field when a user creates a future-dated or high priority wire.
Central 1 charges your financial institution a processing fee per wire. Additional processing fees apply for priority and future-dated wires. Wires processing fees are charged to your Central 1 account at month end. To recover your processing costs, ensure the fee(s) that you charge your customer (pre-populated or manually entered) is, at minimum, the value of the Central 1 processing fee.
11.2	Viewing Outgoing Wire Fees
Authorized Wires Users view outgoing wire fees as follows:
Log in to Wires as described in Chapter 10, Logging in to Wires.
Select
Fees
. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Select Fees
View the Organization Fee page. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Organization Fee Page
11.3	Adding Outgoing Wire Fees
Authorized Wires Users add outgoing wire fees and add-on fees for future-dated and priority wires in the Wires application.
Adding Outgoing Wire Fees
To add outgoing wire fees:
Go to the Organization Fees page as described in Section 11.2, Viewing Outgoing Wire Fees.
Select
Create
. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Selecting 芒聙聹Create芒聙聺
Note:	You can add outgoing wire fees based on maximum settlement amount and/or by wire currency and destination country.
Complete the Create Organization Fee page as described and select
Submit
. See Figure 4.
芒聭
Maximum Settlement Amount
芒聙聯 The maximum wire amount to assign the fee. You can define fees in tiers up to $1,000,000.
芒聢聮
Enter the maximum wire amount to assign the fee, or
芒聢聮
leave blank (defaults to 芒聙聹Any芒聙聺),
芒聙垄
if the wire amount isn芒聙聶t used to determine the fee, or
芒聙垄
to define a fee for wire amounts above the highest specified maximum settlement amount.
芒聭隆
Wire Currency
芒聙聯 The currency of the wire.
芒聢聮
Select
CAD
to define a fee for Canadian dollar wires.
芒聢聮
Select
USD
to define a fee for US dollar wires.
芒聢聮
Select
ANY
to define a fee for all wire currencies or, if you芒聙聶ve defined specific fees for Canadian and/or US dollar wires, to define a fee for all other currencies.
芒聭垄
Destination Country
芒聙聯 The destination country for the defined wire fee.
芒聢聮
Select
Canada
to define a fee for wires destined for Canada.
芒聢聮
Select
United States
to define a fee for wires destined for the United States.
芒聢聮
Select
ANY
to define a fee for wires destined for all countries or, if you芒聙聶ve defined a fee for wires destined for Canada and/or the United States, to define a fee for all other countries.
芒聭拢
Fee
芒聙聯 The customer fee that芒聙聶s pre-populated in the Wires application for wires meeting the defined criteria.
芒聢聮
Enter the fee amount.
Note:	 A user can overwrite the pre-populated fee in Wires.
芒聭陇
Fee Currency
芒聙聯 The currency in which to charge the fee. The available currencies are dynamic, based on the selected transfer currency.
芒聢聮
Select
CAD
to charge the fee in Canadian dollars. Available for all transfer currencies.
芒聢聮
Select
USD
to charge the fee in US dollars. Available for US dollar transfer currencies only.
Figure 4: Adding an Outgoing Wire Fee
View the Organization Fee Page. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Organization Fee Page
Adding Add-On Fees for Future-Dated and Priority Wires
To add add-on fees:
Go to the Organization Fees page as described in Section 11.2, Viewing Outgoing Wire Fees.
Enter the appropriate add-on fee(s), then select
Submit Add-on Fees
. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: Adding Add-on Fees
11.4	Modifying Outgoing Wire Fees
Authorized Wires Users modify outgoing wire fees and add-on fees for future-dated and priority wires in the Wires application.
Modifying Outgoing Wire Fees
To modify outgoing wire fees:
Go to the Organization Fees page as described in Section 11.2, Viewing Outgoing Wire Fees.
Select the arrow beside the applicable fee. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Selecting a Fee to Modify
Enter the fee in the Fee Amount field and select
Submit
. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Updating the Fee Amount
Note:	The Maximum Settlement Amount, Transfer Currency, Destination Country, and Fee Currency fields can芒聙聶t be modified. If changes are required to these fields, delete the applicable fee entry, and create a new one. See Section 11.5, Deleting Outgoing Wire Fees in Wires, and Section 11.3, Adding Outgoing Wire Fees.
Note:	Use the Wires Customization Request, Form 6493, to update pre-populated outgoing wire fees for contingency purposes only. See Section 4.3 Requesting Wires Customization Changes.
Modifying Add-On Fees for Future-Dated and Priority Wires
To modify add-on fees:
Go to the Organization Fees page as described in Section 11.2, Viewing Outgoing Wire Fees.
Enter the appropriate add-on fee(s), then select
Submit Add-on Fees
. See Figure 9.
Figure 9: Managing Add-on Fees
11.5	Deleting Outgoing Wire Fees in Wires
Authorized Wires Users delete outgoing wire fees and add-on fees for priority wires and future-dated wires in the Wires application.
Deleting Regular Outgoing Wire Fees
To delete regular outgoing wire fees:
Go to the Organization Fee page as described in Section 11.2, Viewing Outgoing Wire Fees.
Select the trash can icon beside the applicable fee. See Figure 10.
Figure 10: Selecting the Trash Can Icon
Select
Yes
to confirm the deletion. See Figure 11.
Figure 11: Confirming Deletion
Deleting Add-On Wire Fees for Future-Dated and Priority Wires
To delete add-on wire fees:
Go to the Organization Fees page as described in Section 11.2, Viewing Outgoing Wire Fees.
Enter 芒聙聹0芒聙聺 in the appropriate add-on fee field(s), then select
Submit Add-on Fees
. See Figure 12.
Figure 12: Deleting an Add-on Fee
END
